models.description: Let GitHub Copilot route to the best available model.
Anthropic's frontier reasoning model. Highest quality, slowest, most expensive.
Previous-generation Claude Opus. Strong reasoning at slightly lower cost than 4.7.
Balanced Anthropic model. Recommended default for analytical intake work.
Previous-generation Claude Sonnet. Reliable mid-tier option.
OpenAI's standard general-purpose model. Default for intake analysis.
Code-tuned GPT-5.3. Good for tool-heavy agent flows.
Smaller, faster GPT-5.4 variant. Default for PR-cut phase.
Earlier mini-class GPT-5 model. Cheap and fast.
Legacy GPT-4 family. Very fast, lower quality than 5.x.
Smallest, fastest Anthropic model. Good for cheap PR-cut runs.
